creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #1)
OK. Seems odd now that amd64 dominates, but not a real issue.

So it is pkg version that now lists it as "orphaned" when it did not prior to the introduction of FLAVORS.

The message shows that the origin is misc/compat10x and misc/compat10x is still present, but it is still tagged as "orphaned". Looks like the issue is in ports-mgmt/pkg.

Should this ticket be closed and a new one against ports-mgmt/pkg be submitted?
